class.name: IntrinsicTriangulation
class.brief_description: Improves an existing triangle mesh by flipping edges toward the Delaunay criterion.
class.description:
Takes a triangle mesh and improves its quality by flipping edges and optionally inserting vertices, without changing the vertex positions during the flip stage. This is the [i]intrinsic[/i] approach: topology changes, geometry stays.
Load a mesh, run [method flip_to_delaunay], then retrieve the improved connectivity with [method get_mesh]:
[codeblock] var it := IntrinsicTriangulation.new() it.set_mesh(my_array_mesh) it.flip_to_delaunay() it.smooth_intrinsic_positions(3) $MeshInstance3D.mesh = it.get_mesh() [/codeblock]
[method get_statistics] returns a [Dictionary] with [code]"triangles"[/code], [code]"edges"[/code], [code]"vertices"[/code], and [code]"flips_performed"[/code] keys.

method.name: flip_to_delaunay
method.description: Flips edges until every edge satisfies the Delaunay criterion or [member max_flip_iterations] is reached. Returns [code]true[/code] if the mesh reached a fully Delaunay state before the iteration limit. Vertex positions are not moved.

method.name: get_edge_count
method.description: Returns the number of edges in the current triangulation.

method.name: get_indices
method.description: Returns triangle indices as a flat array of vertex index triples.

method.name: get_mesh
method.description: Builds and returns an [ArrayMesh] from the current vertex positions and triangle connectivity.

method.name: get_statistics
method.description: Returns mesh statistics with keys [code]"triangles"[/code] ([int]), [code]"edges"[/code] ([int]), [code]"vertices"[/code] ([int]), and [code]"flips_performed"[/code] ([int]).

method.name: refine_intrinsic_triangulation
method.description: Inserts new vertices to shorten edges longer than [param target_edge_length], then runs another Delaunay flip pass. A value of [code]-1.0[/code] chooses the target automatically from the current mean edge length. Returns [code]true[/code] if any vertices were inserted.

method.name: set_mesh
method.description: Loads surface [param surface] from [param mesh] as the input triangulation. Extracts vertices, indices, and normals from the surface arrays.

method.name: set_mesh_data
method.description: Sets the triangulation directly from raw arrays. [param indices] must be a multiple of three (one triple per triangle). [param normals] may be empty; normals are recomputed from geometry if omitted.

method.name: smooth_intrinsic_positions
method.description: Moves each interior vertex toward the average of its neighbours for [param iterations] Laplacian passes. Boundary vertices are not moved.

method.name: use_delaunay_flips
method.description: Enables or disables Delaunay flipping in subsequent [method flip_to_delaunay] calls. Disabling this reduces [method flip_to_delaunay] to a no-op, useful when you want only the smoothing pass.

members.member: Minimum angle (in radians) below which a triangle is considered to need improvement. Default is 30° ([code]π/6[/code]). Triangles with all angles above this threshold satisfy the quality criterion.
Maximum number of edge-flip passes [method flip_to_delaunay] performs before stopping, regardless of whether the mesh has converged.
